title: LIVE — Telegram, AI и технологии
sample_messages: 🤖 Появились первые примеры GPT Image 2 — новой модели OpenAI для генерации изображений. Качество генераций выросло радикально, особенно хорошо нейронка справляется с интерфейсами, игровыми сценами и даже рукописным текстом , но пока имеет заметные ограничения и цензуру.
🍏 Apple удалила приложение Bitchat Джека Дорси из китайского AppStore по требованию правительства Китая.
🇷🇺 В Общественной Палате РФ заявили, что кошелек @wаllet внутри Telegram нарушает российское законодательство о ценных бумагах.

🇷🇺 Минцифры обязало крупные IT-компании начать борьбу с пользователями VPN. Приложения будут сравнивать IP-адрес устройства с базой заблоченных адресов, а затем искать признаки VPN-трафика , и выдавать ошибку подключения. ✈ Подключайте умный VPN , который маскирует ваш трафик и позволяет пользоваться российскими сервисами не отключая VPN .

✈️ Telegram разрешил ботам общаться и запускать друг друга. Теперь AI-агент может создавать и управлять целой сетью ботов без кода и участия человека . Режим Bot-to-Bot Communication включается в @BotFather .

☠️ Масштабные сбои в работе интернета затронули все регионы России в последние дни — причиной, по нашей информации, является попытка установить ТСПУ на магистральные каналы связи , отвечающие за глобальный интернет трафик . В ближайшее время власти получат возможность ПОЛНОСТЬЮ изолировать российский сегмент интернета .

🤖 Anthropic представили модель Mythos — ИИ для поиска уязвимостей, который находит баги лучше большинства специалистов по кибербезопасности . Во время тестов он выявил тысячи уязвимостей , которые тысячи разработчиков и миллионы тестов не могли обнаружить за 20 лет , включая цепочку багов в Linux с получением root-доступа. Сейчас доступ к модели выдали только крупным компаниям AWS , Apple , Google , Microsoft , NVIDIA и другим, чтобы они оперативно залатали дыры в своих продуктах.

🤖 Сотрудники OpenAI рассказали, что Сэм Альтман плохо разбирается в программировании и путается в базовых вещах — по их словам, компанию он построил за счёт умения привлекать деньги и сильных специалистов, а также склонен преувеличивать.

📈 #زاگرس رویای بر باد رفته زاگرس گزارش 12 ماهه داد که در فصل زمستان توام با زیان بود. اما یک نکته از گزارش زاگرس مهم بود که چندان مورد توجه قرار نگرفت جریان وجوه نقد زاگرس به فنا رفته است. این شرکت در سال 98، چیزی حدود 3200 میلیارد تومان جریان نقد آزاد تا پیش از تقسیم سود داشته است. 🚫 این عدد تقریبا هر سال کاهش پیدا کرده و سال 1401 به 1900 میلیارد تومان کاهش پیدا کرده. اما 1402 رسما شرکت نابود شده و خالص جریان نقد به 270 میلیارد تومان افت پیدا کرده. 💵 نمودار بالا روند جریان نقد را به دلار نیما نشان می دهد. زاگرسی که 285 میلیون دلار جریان نقد آزاد در سال 98 داشته، 1402 فقط و فقط 7 میلیون دلار جریان نقد آزاد برایش باقی مانده است. ✔️ در یک کلام، بزرگترین متانول ساز کشور، گل سر سبد شرکت ها، موتور تولید ارز برای کشور، در آستانه توقف فعالیت به دلیل نداشتن جریان نقد آزاد قرار دارد. شاید هم زاگرس هم برود با اخذ تسهیلات و با تولید زیان، به تولید ادامه دهد fardaname

✍️ برنارد دبوسمن جونیور گزارشگر بی‌بی‌سی، واشنگتن پس از محاکمه تاریخی و محکومیت کیفری دونالد ترامپ، رئیس‌جمهور سابق ایالات متحده، حامیان مالی بسیار ثروتمند حزب جمهوریخواه از او اعلام حمایت کرده‌اند. ترامپ، کاندیدای جمهوریخواه برای انتخابات ریاست جمهوری در ماه نوامبر امسال، در ارتباط با اتهام جعل اسناد تجاری برای پنهان کردن مبلغ دریافتی به استورمی دانیلز، بازیگر سابق فیلم‌های بزرگسالان، مجرم شناخته شد. در حالیکه ستاد انتخاباتی او از ستاد انتخاباتی جو بایدن و دموکرات‌ها در جمع‌آوری کمک‌های مالی عقب مانده، این محکومیت جان تازه‌ای به فعالیت‌های انتخاباتی او بخشیده است. به گفته ستاد انتخاباتی آقای ترامپ، تنها در ۲۴ ساعت پس از اعلام رای دادگاه، نزدیک به ۵۳ میلیون دلار به صندوق مبارزات انتخاباتی وی پرداخت شد. انتظار می رود میریام ادلسون، میلیاردر آمریکایی-اسرائیلی و صاحب چندین کازینو، از افزایش چند میلیون دلار در صندوق انتخاباتی ترامپ در این هفته خبر دهد. برای خواندن مطلب کامل به لینک زیر بروید. https://www.bbc.com/persian/articles/c988yzlgez0o

🇭🇺 Hungary. The leader of the "Tisza" party, which won the parliamentary elections, Peter Mihály: ▪️ Hungary will not participate in the allocation of a €90 billion loan to Ukraine by the European Union, as it is in a very difficult economic situation. However, it will not hinder the provision of the loan itself. ▪️ Budapest will continue to buy oil from Russia, the termination of supplies through the "Friendship" pipeline jeopardizes Hungary's energy supply. ▪️ Mihály intends to discuss with Moscow the terms and cost of Hungary's existing energy agreements with Russia, including the construction of the "Paks-2" nuclear power plant. ▪️ The restoration of the rights of the ethnic Hungarian minority will be a precondition for the restoration of relations with Kiev. ▪️ Mihály does not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the European Union, it should go through the entire negotiation process. ✨ That is, Hungary will act in the interests of Hungary. In Kiev, there is such jubilation as if Zelensky had won the elections there. ⚡️ Two Majors

🇨🇳 China has warned the US that it will ignore Trump's blockade and continue to send its tankers to Iran for oil through the Strait of Hormuz. Chinese Defense Minister Admiral Dong Jun declared that China expects other nations not to interfere in its affairs, specifically citing its trade and energy ties with Tehran. This escalation follows President Donald Trump's announcement of a sweeping naval operation to "starve Iran of export revenue" after the collapse of high-stakes ceasefire negotiations in Islamabad. 🌒 @EastCalling

Will Trump leave NATO to take Greenland and allow Turkish-Israeli showdown? In addition to snatching Greenland from Denmark, leaving NATO would also allow the Trump administration to avoid another geopolitical hurdle – the growing Turkish-Israeli rivalry. Although it may seem far-fetched now, such a scenario is far from impossible, as America could then just pull a Pilatian move and leave Ankara and Tel Aviv to "fight it out". @ Drago Bosnić known to you from RT and Sputnik Dive in for the full Article Follow and support us

🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The quick operation did not work out. The US began a naval blockade of Iran. From 17:00 Moscow time, the US officially began a naval blockade of Iran . Apparently, the negotiations were incredibly productive. The US Central Command issued a corresponding navigation warning yesterday: "CENTCOM forces will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering and leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10:00 am Eastern Time, in accordance with the President's proclamation." ▪️ "The blockade will be applied impartially to ships of all nations entering or leaving Iranian ports and coastal zones." ▪️ "CENTCOM forces will not interfere with the freedom of navigation for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports" ▪️ "The blockade covers all Iranian ports in the Persian and Oman gulfs, as well as Iran's coastal waters" ▪️ "Any ship entering or leaving the blockade zone without authorization will be intercepted, diverted or captured " ❗️ ✨ We can guess the author of the words by his handwriting: "They are sending our people and our finances to participate in stupid wars abroad. They said: «He will start a war». I'm not going to start a war, I'm going to stop wars». By delaying time by simulating negotiations, the US strengthened its strike group in the region. In addition to several aircraft carrier strike groups, US forces were reinforced with amphibious groups with expeditionary units of the Marine Corps. The 82nd Airborne Division and the 142nd Artillery Brigade continue the transfer of personnel by air. 📌 It's indicative that both sides of the conflict are openly implementing naval blockades as an effective method of influencing the economic (= military) potential of the enemy. No one even mentions the UN anymore. ⚡️ Two Majors

🚩 🇱🇹 The first (and only) division of Lithuania is integrated into the NATO command structure On April 11, at an official ceremony in Ukmergė, the 1st Lithuanian Division included two infantry brigades. Now the division is ready to perform NATO tasks on its front line. The decision to create the division was made in 2022-2023. The basis of the division consisted of: ▪️ Infantry brigade “Geležinis Vilkas” ▪️ Infantry brigade “Žemaitija” ▪️ Engineering battalion The following units are being reinforced: ▪️ Reserve brigade “Aukštaitija” ▪️ Artillery regiment (PzH 2000 self-propelled guns, CAESAR self-propelled guns, HIMARS multiple rocket launchers) ▪️ Air defense regiment (NASAMS and MSHORAD) ▪️ Reconnaissance battalion The division is assigned to the NATO Multinational Corps "North-East" , whose headquarters is located in Szczecin, 🇵🇱 Poland. This is one of the two NATO rapid response corps, responsible for defending the eastern flank. The headquarters of the Lithuanian division underwent a trial run during exercises in 🇩🇪 Germany, confirming its initial operational readiness. Lithuanian Armed Forces Commander-in-Chief, General Raimundas Vaikšnoras: "We are able to independently plan and conduct operations, integrate reinforcements for the division, and act together with allies as part of the corps." ✨ It is planned that the full operational readiness of the division will be achieved by 2030 , with a total strength of about 20,000 soldiers . About 70% ❗️ of the total defense budget will be allocated for the modernization of this unit. Additionally, by the end of 2027, it is expected that full operational readiness of the 🇩🇪 German 45th Tank Brigade will be achieved in Lithuania. The security architecture of NATO's eastern flank continues to shift towards active militarization . ⚡️ Two Majors

title: Telegram Usernames
sample_messages: Channel created

You can set up a public username on Telegram. It then becomes possible for other users to find you by that username — you will appear in contacts search under ‘global results’. This allows to message you without needing to know your number. Public channels and groups can also have usernames. More in our FAQ: https://telegram.org/faq#usernames-and-telegram-me If you mention usernames in Telegram messages, they become a link that opens the conversation, group, or channel. Like this: @username (yes, this example is a little recursive 😁 ). You can also use usernames outside of Telegram with the help of Telegram.me . Like this: https://telegram.me/username For some reason, you can also use this: https://telegram.dog/username Don't ask. 🐺

Starting this week, you can also use stylish t.me links for your profiles, public groups, and channels. Just three characters – the rest is your space. t.me/username Can it get cooler than this? UPD: Yes, it can! 👇
Now every holder of a Telegram @username can use links like username.t.me and https://username.t.me Enjoy! 🥳
